summary: Guest Search in 'Hızlı Rezervasyon' Dialog - All features working correctly on both /reservation-calendar and RoomsTab (/pms > Rooms)
feature_tested: Guest search field in Quick Reservation ('Hızlı Rezervasyon') dialog with debounced search, dropdown results, guest selection, and clear functionality

tests: GET /api/pms/guests/search?q=ali - PASS (returns 3 guests: Ali Veli, Ali Yilmaz, TEST_InvalidDates Guest)
GET /api/pms/guests/search?q=z (1 char) - PASS (returns empty array, min 2 chars required)

reservation_calendar_dialog.dialog_opens: PASS - Clicked red 'Rezervasyon ekle' button, dialog title 'Hızlı Rezervasyon' visible
reservation_calendar_dialog.guest_search_field: PASS - data-testid='new-booking-guest-search' with placeholder 'Misafir ara veya yeni isim gir...'
reservation_calendar_dialog.search_icon: PASS - Magnifying glass icon present in input
reservation_calendar_dialog.debounced_search: PASS - 300ms debounce triggers API call on typing 'ali'
reservation_calendar_dialog.guest_options: PASS - Options show name, email, phone (data-testid='new-booking-guest-option-{id}')
reservation_calendar_dialog.guest_selection: PASS - Selecting guest shows blue info card (data-testid='new-booking-selected-guest')
reservation_calendar_dialog.selected_guest_display: PASS - Shows guest name, email in blue box
reservation_calendar_dialog.clear_button: PASS - × button (data-testid='new-booking-clear-guest') resets to search mode
reservation_calendar_dialog.no_match_hint: PASS - Typing 'zzzzzzz' shows 'yeni misafir olarak eklenecek' message

rooms_tab_dialog.rooms_tab_loads: PASS - Rooms tab shows 41 room cards
rooms_tab_dialog.dialog_opens: PASS - Dialog title 'Hızlı Rezervasyon' with room info 'Oda 106 - Standard'

api_endpoints_verified.GET /api/pms/guests/search?q=ali&limit=8: Returns array of guests matching 'ali' with full profile info

critical_code_review_comments: Guest search endpoint at /api/pms/guests/search correctly handles minimum character validation (2 chars)
Search queries name, first_name, last_name, email, phone, id_number, passport_number fields
Frontend debounce (300ms) prevents excessive API calls during typing
Both NewBookingDialog (CalendarDialogs.js) and RoomsTab.js share consistent guest search UX
All interactive elements have appropriate data-testid attributes for test automation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guest search feature in 'Hızlı Rezervasyon' dialog is fully functional. Access via: 1) /reservation-calendar > red 'Rezervasyon ekle' button OR click empty calendar cell, 2) /pms > Rooms tab > 'Rezervasyon Yap' button on available room cards. Search for 'ali' returns test data. The feature uses debounced API calls to /api/pms/guests/search endpoint.
